notes: Chunk 68 DONE (Template C, Tier B, 25 new routes): Uganda to Italy/Belgium/Austria/Switzerland/Czech Republic/Poland/Hungary/Denmark/Sweden/Norway/Finland/Ireland/Portugal/Greece (14, completing Uganda's outbound EU coverage); Greece to Lebanon/Rwanda/Uganda/Armenia/Georgia/Azerbaijan/Kazakhstan (7, filling reciprocal gaps); Estonia and Latvia to Poland/Hungary (4, closing the last Baltic-to-Central-Europe gaps). Uganda is an EU-unlisted third country: full titre test + 90-day wait, now cited under the current 22 April 2026 EU framework (Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2026/131, Implementing Regulation (EU) 2026/705 and 2026/636, replacing the superseded 576/2013 and 577/2013). Switzerland route carries Uganda's FSVO advance permission and 3-month wait. Norway and Finland carry the dog tapeworm treatment rule; Ireland carries TRACES pre-notification. Estonia/Latvia to Poland/Hungary are intra-EU pet-passport routes with the April 2026 EU-residency passport restriction noted. Confirmed Wizz Air has a strict no-pet policy (excluded from all airline picks); used LOT Polish Airlines and airBaltic cabin options instead. Blog Day 26 is next. Next: Chunk 69 (Template D, Tier B).

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
